metadata.description: Open Claude Code plugins from Luminik — practical agents and skills for solo founders, GTM operators, and B2B event marketers.

plugins.name: event-outbound
plugins.description: Generate multi-channel cold-outbound sequences for B2B event attendees. Takes an event URL + your company URL + a target attendee persona and produces email + LinkedIn sequences across a parameterised lead time (1-8 weeks). Grounded in publicly-taught cold-outbound frameworks and published benchmark research. Every generated touch is validated: subject under 4 words, body 50-100 words, no pitch-speak, CTA pattern favouring concrete offers over meeting-asks.
